summary: Implemented the threat model rules engine with two new files. `threat-schema.ts` defines ThreatRule, ThreatFinding, ThreatInput interfaces and Severity/ThreatCategory types. `threat-rules.ts` implements four deterministic rules: identity-exposure (entropy >= 70 → Medium, >= 85 → High), social-engineering (>= 2 medium+ confidence inferences → Low, >= 3 → Medium), permission-abuse (camera+mic granted → High, single high-risk → Medium, debt >= 40 → Low), and shoulder-surfing (large screen + standard DPR + no touch → Low). Each rule includes an explanation field for explainability. All 42 tests pass, plus lint, typecheck, and full test suite (759 tests).
